# QuantPilot — Codex Level 3–4 Handoff from Fable5

**Status:** TEMPLATE — run `/write-codex-handoff` to generate the actual handoff  
**Target file:** `docs/claude/codex_level_3_4_handoff_from_fable5.md`  
**Generated by:** `codex-handoff-writer` skill

---

## How to Generate This Handoff

Prerequisites:
1. Recipe exists at `docs/quant_recipes/fable5_level_3_4_autopilot_recipe.md`
2. Review report exists with `overall_verdict: approved`

Then in a Claude Code session:

```
/write-codex-handoff <recipe-id>
```

---

## Expected Handoff Structure

When generated, this file will contain a complete Codex implementation task specification:

```yaml
codex_handoff:
  task_id: <recipe-id>-impl
  recipe_id: <string>
  review_id: <string>
  priority: high
  complexity: L  # XS | S | M | L | XL
  depends_on:
    - stage-1-pre-harness-complete
    - quantpilot.packages.core.schemas  # must match schemas.py

  goal: >
    Implement the <strategy name> Level 3/4 recipe as a StrategyRecipe instance
    in quantpilot/packages/core/, with corresponding signal generator,
    risk gate integration, and audit log emission. The implementation must
    pass all acceptance tests listed below without live market data.

  inputs:
    data_sources:
      - name: ohlcv_daily
        schema:
          ticker: str
          date: date
          open: float
          high: float
          low: float
          close: float
          volume: int
          adj_close: float
        source: fixtures/ohlcv.json (tests) | paper_data_feed (paper trading)

    parameters:
      - name: momentum_lookback_days
        type: int
        valid_range: [20, 252]
        default: 240
      - name: max_position_pct
        type: float
        valid_range: [0.01, 0.15]
        default: 0.05

    env_vars:
      - QUANTPILOT_EXECUTION_MODE  # must be 'approval_required' or 'paper_trading'
      - QUANTPILOT_BROKER_MODE     # must be 'mock' or 'paper'
      # Values are not included here — read from environment only

  outputs:
    artifacts:
      - path: quantpilot/packages/core/strategy_<recipe_id>.py
        description: StrategyRecipe subclass with signal generation logic
      - path: quantpilot/tests/unit/test_<recipe_id>.py
        description: Unit tests for signal generation and risk gate integration

    performance_sla:
      signal_generation: "< 500ms for 100 tickers on 10 years of daily data"
      risk_check: "< 50ms per order plan"

  acceptance_criteria:
    - id: AC-01
      given: OHLCV fixture data for 10 tickers over 5 years
      when: signal generator runs for signal_date = last date in fixture
      then: returns a list of Signal objects with valid action enum values

    - id: AC-02
      given: a Signal with action=buy_ready and strength > 0.7
      when: risk gate evaluates the resulting OrderPlan
      then: RiskCheck.passed=True and OrderStatus transitions to risk_checked

    - id: AC-03
      given: portfolio drawdown exceeds max_portfolio_drawdown_pct
      when: risk gate evaluates any new OrderPlan
      then: RiskCheck.passed=False with failed_checks containing "drawdown_circuit_breaker"

    - id: AC-04
      given: Level 3 execution mode (approval_required)
      when: a risk-checked OrderPlan is created
      then: OrderStatus = proposed and no order is submitted until user_approved

    - id: AC-05
      given: Level 4 with RL agent active
      when: RL agent emits output
      then: output is of type target_weight_delta (float in [-0.1, 0.1]) or strategy_selection (enum)
      and: output is never a raw broker order dict

    - id: AC-06
      given: any execution
      when: an order is submitted
      then: an AuditLogEvent is created with entity_type="OrderPlan" and source="strategy_<recipe_id>"

    - id: AC-07
      given: any execution
      when: OperationReport is created
      then: live_trading_enabled = False

  test_stubs:
    - function: test_signal_generation_returns_valid_actions
    - function: test_risk_gate_passes_valid_order
    - function: test_drawdown_circuit_breaker_blocks_new_entries
    - function: test_level3_requires_user_approval
    - function: test_rl_output_is_target_weight_delta
    - function: test_audit_log_created_on_submit
    - function: test_live_trading_remains_disabled

  out_of_scope:
    - Live order execution
    - Real broker API calls
    - Reading .env or secrets files
    - Modifying UserPolicy without user action
    - Implementing the UI approval workflow (that is Stage 4)

  notes: >
    All tests must pass using fixture data from quantpilot/tests/fixtures/ohlcv.json.
    Do not add live data dependencies to the test suite.
    The RL contract block (if Level 4) is in the recipe YAML — implement the environment
    and agent wrapper as specified; do not change the action space or safety overrides.
```

---

## Codex Implementation Checklist

After receiving this handoff, Codex must:
- [ ] Implement `StrategyRecipe` subclass
- [ ] Implement signal generator using fixture-compatible data interface
- [ ] Wire into existing `HarnessService` in `harness_service.py`
- [ ] Confirm `RiskCheck` integration uses existing `schemas.py` models
- [ ] Pass all 7 acceptance criteria
- [ ] Write all 7 test stubs as full test functions
- [ ] Confirm `OperationReport.live_trading_enabled = False` in all test paths
